initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(Laboratory.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = (SELECT UA FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = Laboratory.ID ORDER BY Date DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT AVG(Laboratory.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = (
    SELECT UA 
    FROM Laboratory AS L2 
    WHERE L2.ID = Laboratory.ID 
    ORDER BY L2.Date DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT AVG(Laboratory.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = (SELECT UA FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = Patient.ID ORDER BY Date DESC LIMIT 1)
AND Laboratory.UA = 'normal';

WITH LatestLab AS (
    SELECT ID, MAX(Date) AS LatestDate
    FROM Laboratory
    GROUP BY ID
),
NormalUAPatients AS (
    SELECT L.ID, L.UA
    FROM Laboratory L
    JOIN LatestLab LL ON L.ID = LL.ID AND L.Date = LL.LatestDate
    WHERE L.UA = 'normal'
)
SELECT AVG(CAST(UA AS REAL)) AS avg_ua
FROM NormalUAPatients;

WITH LatestLab AS (
    SELECT 
        ID, 
        MAX(Date) AS latest_date
    FROM Laboratory
    GROUP BY ID
),
NormalUA AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID
    FROM Laboratory L
    JOIN LatestLab LL ON L.ID = LL.ID AND L.Date = LL.latest_date
    WHERE L.UA >= 3.5 AND L.UA <= 7.0  -- assuming normal range for UA is 3.5-7.0 mg/dL
)
SELECT 
    AVG(L.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN NormalUA N ON L.ID = N.ID
JOIN LatestLab LL ON L.ID = LL.ID AND L.Date = LL.latest_date;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT AVG(latest.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM (
    SELECT Laboratory.ID, Laboratory.UA
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE Laboratory.Date = (
        SELECT MAX(l2.Date)
        FROM Laboratory l2
        WHERE l2.ID = Laboratory.ID
    )
) AS latest
JOIN Patient ON latest.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE latest.UA = 'normal';

candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(latest.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM (
  SELECT Laboratory.ID, Laboratory.UA
  FROM Laboratory
  WHERE Laboratory.Date = (
    SELECT MAX(l2.Date)
    FROM Laboratory l2
    WHERE l2.ID = Laboratory.ID
  )
) AS latest
JOIN Patient ON latest.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE latest.UA = 'normal';

SELECT AVG(latest.UA) AS avg_ua
FROM (
    SELECT Laboratory.ID, Laboratory.UA
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE Laboratory.Date = (
        SELECT MAX(l2.Date)
        FROM Laboratory l2
        WHERE l2.ID = Laboratory.ID
    )
) AS latest
JOIN Patient ON latest.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE latest.UA = 'normal';
